title: After the Yasuda Kinen: My Kind of Courage

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I pour my heart and soul into the race, run as hard
as I can... and I manage to win!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It seems my feelings have reached Zephyr. She
says she now has the courage to overcome the
hurdle she's been facing.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Next is the Sprinters Stakes. Just like last year,
I'm up against Bakushin O and Zephyr. But things
are different this year.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've changed, and Trainer is even more wonderful.
I want to give our current selves a perfect victory!
